title: Coruscant Security Force assault ship
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{StarshipClass |image= |name=Coruscant Security Force
assault ship |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Assault ship/Legends|Assault ship]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability=[[Law enforcement agency/Legends|Law enforcement agency]] |role=*Patrol *Pursuit *Troop deployment |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] *[[Galactic Alliance Guard]] }} The '''Coruscant Security Force assault ship''' was an [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] used by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]]. ==History== They were used during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] to help round up civilians who refused to stay inside and away from the battle. They were adapted and also used by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] around [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}} *[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines'' abridged audiobook]] [[Category:Coruscant police vehicles]]
